Title: Validating Legacy GPUs for Local LLM Inference

Introduction:
Legacy graphics processing units (GPUs) are still widely used in various industries, including finance, healthcare, and manufacturing. However, with the increasing demand for AI-powered applications, the need for GPUs has also grown. This note aims to validate legacy GPUs for local LLM inference by providing an overview of their performance, compatibility, and limitations.

Title: Validating Legacy GPUs for Local LLM Inference

Introduction:
Legacy graphics processing units (GPUs) are widely used in various applications, including machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI).
